name: Roast Chicken and Kiwi with Raspberry Glaze
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle the chicken with salt and pepper.
2. Place the chicken, skin side up, in a single layer in a large shallow baking pan.
3. Brush some butter over the chicken.
4. Bake in a 400°F oven for about 45 minutes or until the chicken is fork tender, basting frequently with butter.
5. Drain off the fat.
6. Spoon glaze over the chicken and repeat the glazing procedure using sauce that gathers in the pan.
7. Top with kiwi slices, using one kiwi per half chicken.
8. Return to oven and bake about 3 minutes or until fruit and chicken are well glazed.
